scenarios.cli_command: ar write codex-compat-fact: sky is blue [2026-06-18T14-33-21] --project codex-compat-test

scenarios.name: remember: routes to palace with context hint
scenarios.cli_command: ar palace write architecture codex-compat-arch: MCP tools validated at 2026-06-18T14-33-21 --project codex-compat-test

scenarios.name: recall: retrieves fact written by remember
scenarios.cli_command: ar search sky is blue --project codex-compat-test

scenarios.name: check: alignment via insight recall

scenarios.name: session_end: saves journal entry

scenarios.name: cross-session recall: fact persists after session_end
digest: store cached analysis result
scenarios.cli_command: ar digest store codex compat mcp verification --scope codex compatibility verification --content MCP tools verified: session_start remember recall check session_end digest all operational --project codex-compat-test
